tracks.rawText: 3:38Me voy pal pueblov5.5CoverA solo acoustic guitar piece, fingerpicked with a clean, bright tone, The guitar is likely a nylon-string classical guitar, given the warmth and sustain, The tempo is slow and deliberate, creating a contemplative and melancholic mood, The melody is intricate, featuring arpeggiated chords and single-note lines that weave together, The harmony is primarily diatonic, with occasional chromatic passing tones adding color, There are no discernible chord progressions in a traditional sense, but rather a continuous melodic and harmonic development, The piece is entirely instrumental, with no vocals or other instruments, The production is dry, with minimal reverb, emphasizing the natural acoustics of the instrument, The dynamic range is subtle, with slight variations in picking intensity, The overall structure is free-form, without clear verse-chorus divisions1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Me voy pal pueblo
